title: Cause of crash landing was apparently double engine failure
description: NATIONAL NEWS - The Accident and Incident...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News\n Update","html":"Breaking News\n Update"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - The Accident and Incident Investigations Department (AIID) of the South African Civil Aviation Authority (Sacaa) confirmed that the light aircraft involved in a crash landing in Thembalethu this morning is a Rockwell 500S, with registration ZS-IZN at the George Airport.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - The Accident and Incident Investigations Department (AIID) of the South African Civil Aviation Authority (Sacaa) confirmed that the light aircraft involved in a crash landing in Thembalethu this morning is a Rockwell 500S, with registration ZS-IZN at the George Airport."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The AIID said preliminary information indicates double engine failure approximately 15km from the airport with the aircraft crash landing in a nearby cemetery around the Thembalethu township."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The aircraft had departed from the Vereeniging Airport en route to the George Airport with two occupants.\"","html":"\"The aircraft had departed from the Vereeniging Airport en route to the George Airport with two occupants.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The aircraft had departed from the Vereeniging Airport en route to the George Airport with two occupants on board - one pilot and a passenger. Both occupants were taken to a nearby hospital.\"","html":"\"The aircraft had departed from the Vereeniging Airport en route to the George Airport with two occupants on board - one pilot and a passenger. Both occupants were taken to a nearby hospital.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It said that a preliminary report will be published on the Sacaa website in 30 days of the accident.","html":"It said that a preliminary report will be published on the Sacaa website in 30 days of the accident."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read a previous article:","html":"Read a previous article:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Light aircraft does emergency landing in Thembalethu","html":"Light aircraft does emergency landing in Thembalethu"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Cause of crash landing was apparently double engine failure
